subcodes.title: Words spoken at German hostel in Tiberias, 1916-09-24
subcodes.first_line: How many souls have fallen into this thought and been utterly effaced! The Fatimid Caliphate strove for two hundred years, yet all was in vain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسا نفوس به این فکر افتادند و به کلی محو شدند.  خلافت فاطمیه  دویست سال زحمت کشید بی نتیجه
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @Islamic laws and jurisprudence
